description: Wire existing proactive infrastructure into 7 patterns: single human gate, deal heartbeat, overnight+morning triage, learning loop, deal improvement suggestions, cross-deal awareness, pipeline hygiene

extractedRequirements: Pattern 1: Single human gate — agent drafts follow-ups/prep, rep approves output not intent
Pattern 2: Deal heartbeat — scan after every deal event (meeting, email, stage change), route by severity
Pattern 3: Overnight work + morning triage — actionable morning brief with approve/edit/dismiss buttons
Pattern 4: Sales learning loop — calibrate from accepted/rejected drafts, track what works per rep
Pattern 5: Deal improvement suggestions — proactive 'strengthen this deal' recommendations
Pattern 6: Cross-deal awareness — detect conflicts across parallel sales activities
Pattern 7: Pipeline hygiene — periodic cleanup with one-tap fixes
extractedConstraints: Must wire existing infrastructure — orchestrator, triageRules, morning brief, HITL, trustCapital all exist
Event source wiring is the primary gap — adapters ready, runner ready, triggers need connecting
Edge function timeout limit (5-10min) — async job queuing for heavy scans
Claude API cost — use Haiku for scanning, batch findings per call
Must follow existing patterns: getCorsHeaders, maybeSingle, explicit column selection

answeredQuestions.a: All 7 patterns — complete proactive sales teammate

team.tierReason: 15+ stories, schema changes, cross-feature deps (orchestrator+Slack+HITL+morning brief), security surface (deal data, contact PII)

stories.title: Create deal_observations table + RLS policies
acceptance: deal_observations table created with all columns from PRD
Unique dedup index on (org_id, deal_id, category) WHERE status = 'open'
RLS policies: users see own org's observations only
Migration is idempotent (DROP POLICY IF EXISTS before CREATE)

stories.title: Create learning_preferences table + RLS policies
acceptance: learning_preferences table: id, user_id, org_id, preference_key, preference_value, confidence, sample_count, updated_at
Tracks extracted preferences like 'prefers_short_emails', 'removes_ps_line', 'casual_greeting'
RLS: users see own preferences only
Upsert-friendly unique index on (user_id, preference_key)

stories.title: Build proactive-deal-heartbeat edge function
acceptance: Edge function scans deals for 8 observation categories from PRD
Classifies severity using existing triageRules.ts
Stores observations in deal_observations with dedup
Auto-resolves observations when condition clears
Follows agent-crm-heartbeat auth pattern (CRON_SECRET or service-role)
Uses getCorsHeaders(req) from _shared/corsHelper.ts

stories.title: Wire deal stage change trigger to heartbeat
acceptance: Database trigger on deals table fires on stage_id changes
Trigger calls proactive-deal-heartbeat via pg_net or webhook
Heartbeat runs within 5 minutes of stage change
Idempotent: re-triggering same event doesn't create duplicate observations

stories.title: Wire meeting_ended event to follow-up draft + heartbeat
acceptance: meeting_ended event in orchestrator triggers: (1) follow-up draft adapter, (2) deal heartbeat
Follow-up draft stored in crm_approval_queue with action_type='email_draft'
Draft includes meeting context, attendee names, key topics discussed
Draft appears within 2 hours of meeting end
Autonomy tier checked via autonomyResolver before delivery method

stories.title: Add nightly heartbeat cron (2am scan of all active deals)
acceptance: pg_cron job fires at 2am UTC daily
Calls proactive-deal-heartbeat for each org with active deals
Batches by org to respect edge function timeouts
Results available for morning brief at 8am

stories.title: Extend morning brief with actionable sections
acceptance: buildMorningBriefData() queries deal_observations (HIGH, open) and crm_approval_queue (pending)
'Ready to Send' section shows pending follow-up drafts with preview + Send/Edit buttons
'Prep Complete' section shows today's meeting briefs
'Attention Needed' section shows HIGH observations with action buttons
Block Kit buttons use existing slack-interactive action handler pattern

stories.title: Add morning brief action handlers to slack-interactive
acceptance: Send action: executes email via existing adapter, updates crm_approval_queue status
Edit action: opens Slack modal with pre-filled draft, saves edits back
Dismiss action: updates observation/approval status to 'dismissed'
Snooze action: sets next_check_at on observation + 7 days
All actions record outcome via outcomeLearning.recordOutcome()

stories.title: Wire Slack button outcomes to outcomeLearning
acceptance: Send → recordOutcome('accepted', { category, deal_id })
Edit → recordOutcome('edited', { category, deal_id, changes_diff })
Dismiss → recordOutcome('rejected', { category, deal_id, reason })
Edit diffs captured: what the rep changed in the draft
Confidence adjustments applied via getConfidenceAdjustment()

stories.title: Extract and store learning preferences from edit diffs
acceptance: After 5+ edits with similar pattern, extract preference (e.g. 'shorter_emails', 'casual_greeting')
Store in learning_preferences table with confidence score
Preferences fed into follow-up draft generation prompts
Top 3 preferences per user included in draft context

stories.title: Build deal improvement suggestions skill
acceptance: Analyzes: deal stage, contact count, conversation history, competitor mentions, proposal status
Generates 2-3 tagged suggestions (MULTI-THREAD, URGENCY, PROOF, etc.)
Stores as deal_observations with category='improvement_suggestion' severity='medium'
Delivered via Command Centre writeToCommandCentre() adapter
Included in daily digest for deals with recent activity

stories.title: Add cross-deal conflict detection to heartbeat
acceptance: Detects contacts appearing in 2+ active deals
Detects companies with deals from different reps
MEDIUM severity → daily digest; HIGH (same-day overlap) → morning brief
Dismissible with 'this is intentional' flag
Query uses existing deals + contacts + deal_contacts tables

stories.title: Extend pipeline hygiene digest with actionable buttons
acceptance: Archive button: moves deal to Closed Lost with reason
Snooze button: sets check-in reminder + 7 days
Re-engage button: drafts re-engagement email from deal context
Update stage button: dropdown to move deal
5 hygiene categories: stale deals, duplicate contacts, undone tasks, stuck deals, bounced emails

stories.title: Add weekly hygiene cron (Monday 9am)
acceptance: pg_cron fires Monday 9am UTC
Calls extended pipeline hygiene digest per org
Grouped Slack DM with all hygiene items + action buttons
Actions feed into outcomeLearning

stories.title: Add Agent Learning section to Command Centre
acceptance: Shows acceptance rate by category (7d / 30d)
Shows Trust Capital score with milestone progress bar
Shows recent calibration events
Weekly summary in morning brief: 'Your agent accepted 85% of follow-ups (up from 72%)'
Uses existing Command Centre layout patterns
